chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7389 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.32524/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Ghilam Hyder Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Amir Ali Shaikh, advocate for respondent. Per learned counsel the purpose of this petition has been served, therefore, it may be disposed. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
